string.name: permission_reason_intercept_input
string.value: Used to capture touch and key input events and forward them to the game rendering engine for gameplay interaction

string.name: permission_title_multimodal_input
string.value: Allow "Phira" to use multimodal input services?

string.name: permission_read_write_touch
string.value: Used to capture touch events and forward them to the game engine for interaction

string.name: permission_reason_disable_touch
string.value: If disabled, the app will not respond to touch controls, resulting in inability to play normally.
